zh.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr於1586年出生在英國。他於1624年與Adria Hoare結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1611年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州伊麗莎白 希迪笛卡爾 波特 可福特並在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪住了大約1年。他於1624年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 愛德華加斯托被列為assemblyman。他去世於1658年3月30日在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr于1586年出生在英国。他于1624年与Adria Hoare结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1611年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州伊麗莎白 希迪笛卡爾 波特 可福特并在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪住了大约1年。他于1624年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州普林斯 愛德華加斯托被列为assemblyman。他去世于1658年3月30日在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可享年72岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Harris
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Harry
meanings: English (mainly south Wales and southwestern England): from the medieval personal name Harry, a common form of Henry , with assimilation of -nr- to -rr- and regular Middle English change of -er- to -ar-. In south Wales the surname is generally a post-medieval coinage, in most cases not hereditary until the 18th or 19th century.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Hariric, composed of the elements hari, heri ‘army’ + rīc ‘power(ful)’.
Native American (e.g. Navajo): adoption of the English personal name Harry (see 1 above) as a surname.

variants.name: Haris
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of   Harris  .
Muslim: from the Arabic personal name based on ḥārith, ḥāris ‘plowman, cultivator’. Compare Hares .

variants.name: Harries
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Elfriede, Wolfgang.
North German and East Frisian: variant of   Harjes  .

variants.name: Henry
meanings: English, French, Walloon, and West Indian (mainly Jamaica and Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements haim, heim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’, introduced to England by the Normans in the form Henri. During the Middle Ages this name became enormously popular in England and was borne by eight kings. Continental forms of the personal name were equally popular throughout Europe. In the period in which the majority of English surnames were formed, a common English vernacular form of the name was Harry, hence the surnames Harris (southern) and Harrison (northern). Official documents of the period normally used the Latinized form Henricus. In medieval times, English Henry absorbed an originally distinct Old English personal name that had hagan ‘hawthorn’ (compare Hain 2) as its first element, and there has also been confusion with Amery. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. German Heinrich , and also their derivatives, e.g. Swedish Henriksson (see Henrikson ). Compare Henri .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hInnéirghe ‘descendant of Innéirghe’, a byname based on éirghe ‘arising’.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Éinrí or Mac Einri, patronymics from the personal names Éinrí, Einri, Irish forms of Henry. It is also found as a variant of McEnery .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr was born in 1586, in England. He married Adria Hoare in 1624. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America in 1611 and lived in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America for about 1 years. In 1624, at the age of 38, his occupation is listed as assemblyman in Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginia, British Colonial America. He died on 30 March 1658, in Henrico, Virginia, United States, at the age of 72, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr est né en 1586, à Angleterre. Il a épousé Adria Hoare en 1624. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1611 et a vécu à Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique pendant environ 1 ans. En 1624, à l’âge de 38 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est assemblyman à Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique. Il est décédé le 30 mars 1658, à Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr wurde 1586 in England geboren. Er hat 1624 Adria Hoare geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er ist 1611 nach Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er hat ungefähr 1 Jahre lang in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America gelebt. 1624, als er 38 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als assemblyman in Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginia, British Colonial America aufgeführt. Er starb am 30. März 1658 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Henrico, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr è nato il nel 1586 nel England. Lui sposato Adria Hoare nel 1624. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America nel 1611 e vissuto a Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America per circa 1 anni. Nel 1624, all'età di 38 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come assemblyman nel Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginia, British Colonial America. Morì il 30 marzo 1658, nel Henrico, Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Srは1586年にイギリスで生まれた。1624年にAdria Hoareと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1611年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州エリザベス シトイオルド ポイント コムフォートに移住し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイに約1年間住んでいた。1624年，38歳の時，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州プリンス エドワードジャムストウンでの職業はassemblymanと記録されている。彼は1658年3月30日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr(은)는 1586년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 1624년 Adria Hoare(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 엘리자베스 시티 드 포인트 코포트로 이민을 떠났고, 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티에서 약 1년 동안 살았다. 1624년, 38세의 나이로 그의 직업은 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 프린스 에드워드 자메스타운에서 assemblyman이었다. 그는 1658년 3월 30일 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr nasceu em 1586, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Adria Hoare em 1624. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America em 1611 e viveu em Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America por quase 1 anos. Em 1624, com 38 anos, sua profissão aparece como assemblyman em Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginia, British Colonial America. Ele faleceu em 30 de março de 1658, em Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr родился в 1586 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Adria Hoare в 1624 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в олд поинт комфорт, элизабет сити, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1611 году, а также жил в местности чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика около 1 лет. В 1624 году, в возрасте 38 лет,  он работал по профессии assemblyman в местности джеместоун, принц эдвард, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. Он умер 30 марта 1658 г. в местности хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Capt Thomas Harris Sr nació en 1586, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Adria Hoare en 1624. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Inmigró a Old Point Comfort, Elizabeth City, Virginia, British Colonial America en 1611 y vivió en Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America durante unos 1 años. En 1624, a la edad de 38 años, su ocupación registrada era assemblyman en Jamestown, Prince Edward, Virginia, British Colonial America. Murió el 30 de marzo de 1658, en Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.
